versions.description: AgGrid built-in cell renderer types (tag, avatar, link, date, boolean, progress, number) + ellipsis + align

codemods.description: Report-only: detect cellRenderer HTML patterns that could migrate to cell.type. Each column requires human review and author sign-off.

versions.description: Antd v6 upgrade, layout grid changes, dayjs migration

codemods.description: Rename areas to slots
Move properties.style to style: { /element }
Move inline style props to style: { /* } sub-slots
Convert bordered: false to variant: borderless
Rename deprecated properties and events (visible, dotPosition, etc.)
Tabs tabPosition to tabPlacement with value mapping
Notification message property renamed to title
Divider type/orientation dual rename with value mapping
Button type/danger to color + variant mapping
Detect public/styles.less and map Less variables to antd tokens
Detect custom date format strings for dayjs compatibility
Remove meta.styles from custom block plugins, add direct CSS imports
Rename xxl breakpoint key to 2xl
Rename gutter to gap and contentGutter to contentGap
Drop content* prefix from layout properties
Rename layout.align to layout.selfAlign
Rename _moment operator to _dayjs
Report thresholds usage in _dayjs.humanizeDuration
Migrate responsive style breakpoints to Tailwind classes
Replace removed Comment block with Flex + Avatar + Paragraph composition
Migrate custom block plugin architecture: types.js, meta.js, withBlockDefaults
Replace Emotion-style nested CSS selectors (&:hover, & > *) with Tailwind classes
Replace removed AgGrid*Dark block types with auto-detecting light variants
Remove header.theme, sider.theme, menu.theme from page layout blocks and migrate nested style props
Move react, react-dom, and antd from dependencies to peerDependencies in custom block plugins
